source: slack-orchestrator internal/inbound.DefaultCapabilityContractV1 (offline fallback; live local uses GET /debug/capability-catalog)

skills.label: Create Email
skills.description: Draft, send, and triage email communication. Requires confirmation before send.

paramDefaults.to: Message author (Slack profile; makeacompany slack→email index when configured)

skills.label: Create Doc
skills.description: Create, edit, and organize working docs. Requires confirmation before publish.

paramDefaults.title: Derived from intent when omitted; runtime infers a working title before draft
paramDefaults.editors: Message author email (implicit default); append @mentions or explicit editor emails

skills.label: Create Company
skills.description: Provision a company channel, run onboarding, create channels, and invite members. Requires confirmation before writes.

paramDefaults.name: Company / channel slug (gathered in-thread when not in the first message)
paramDefaults.founders: Message author (implicit default); the skill appends @mentioned cofounders

skills.label: Delete Company
skills.description: Archive a company Slack channel and remove app-owned Redis data for that workspace. Requires explicit Confirm/Cancel before any write.

paramDefaults.channel: The Slack channel where the command runs (implicit default; operators do not pass this at runtime)

skills.label: Read Company
skills.description: Summarize this channel from cached Slack history in Redis (hourly digest). Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Read Skills
skills.description: List team skills from the capability catalog (who has which skills). Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Read User
skills.description: Show the message author's Stripe customer id (makeacompany Redis profile), Slack user id, and Slack workspace team id. Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Read Twitter
skills.description: Search Twitter by keyword and fetch high-impression tweets (not the platform trend list). Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Read Trends
skills.description: Fetch the current Twitter/X trend list (not keyword search). Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).
